_schema: metric = {D|V}{number}{unit}. D{p}% = dose to p% of structure; D{v}cc = dose to hottest v cc; V{d}Gy = % volume >= d Gy. direction: upper|lower. For D-metrics limit is % of prescription; for V-metrics limit is % volume. weight 0-100 (0 = inactive, agent-controlled). CTV mean is normalised to Rx automatically.
